title: pi-goblins configuration
description: Global configuration for Herdr-owned Pi goblins. Place at ~/.pi/agent/goblins.json.

turnLimit.description: Maximum assistant turns before the child bridge publishes a truncated result.

toolAllowlist.description: Child tool allowlist. Omit for Pi defaults; use an empty array for --no-tools.

modelPatterns.description: Case-sensitive whole canonical provider/model globs using only * and ?. Omit to allow all; use an empty array to allow none.
